state.m: float64 cell field in [0,m_max], transported mobile matter
state.n: float64 cell field in [0,n_max], transported resource and bond fuel
state.b: float64 face field with shape (2,H,W) in [0,1]; index 0 is the positive-y face and index 1 the positive-x face

explicitly_absent: genome, fitness, reproduction or ownership variable
structural_semantics: b is implemented only as a physical structural order parameter; Stage A assigns no memory semantics and makes no claim excluding what separately revalidated later evidence could establish

face_convention.canonical_value: J[q,y,x] is positive from cell (y,x) to its periodic +1 neighbour along q
face_convention.antisymmetry: the reverse directed value is -J[q,y,x] and the two endpoint updates use the same stored float with opposite signs
face_convention.update: q_next=q-dt*div(J_active) before local bond fuel/work debits

equations.bond_update: b_eq=r_on/(r_on+r_off); b_next=b_eq+(b-b_eq)*exp(-(r_on+r_off)*dt), with b unchanged when both rates are zero
equations.maintenance_recycling: W_recycled=epsilon_b*min(g_form,g_rupture) exposes simultaneous on/off turnover maintaining structural b without adding a new external sink
equations.weakening_and_dissolution: gross rupture release is partitioned exactly in the ratio (k_tension*T):k_off before maintenance recycling; external Q_rupture is partitioned by the same ratio into weakening and dissolution heat

operator_order: validate the complete pre-step state and intervention plan
compute all affinities, natural face fluxes, bond rates and gross bond events from the common pre-step state
apply immutable face coefficients once to natural transported fluxes
apply paired transported contributions and precomputed endpoint net-formation fuel debits; maintenance recycling is internal and changes no state
return the new state and complete natural/active/missing flux and work ledger

admissible_timestep.frozen_rule: LatticeBondSpec rejects dt above the smaller finite bound; no state output is clipped and no arm-specific substep is permitted

energy_identity: sum(n_next)+epsilon_b*sum(b_next)+sum(Q_rupture)=sum(n)+epsilon_b*sum(b); gross formation work=external formation fuel+recycled maintenance work; gross rupture release=rupture heat+the same recycled maintenance work

intervention.plan: immutable per-face matter_scale and resource_scale arrays in [0,1]
intervention.open: all coefficients equal one and must be byte-identical to no-plan execution
intervention.closed: zero only the declared pre-existing transported face term; bond rates/state are not directly gated
intervention.composition: elementwise multiplication; commutative, associative and idempotent for binary open/closed masks
intervention.missing_ledger: J_natural-J_active and the exact opposite endpoint contributions are retained per channel; onset state-energy jump is zero

endpoint_firewall: no family is selected or implemented as a scientific primary response; directly gated fluxes and bond terms remain compliance diagnostics
